title: Forge Optimized
description: A lightweight optimisation pack built for Minecraft Forge
body:
This modpack focuses on **performance, smooth gameplay, and stable FPS**, while keeping the vanilla look and feel of Minecraft intact. It uses some of the most popular and efficient optimization mods available for Forge.

[![Fast Client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4eaf23726a62c7c004ca58006fa258b1fd6aeac6.png)](https://fastclient.net/spunky)

---

## 🚀 Features of Forge Optimized Modpack

* **Higher FPS** – Reduce lag and stutters
* **Smoother Gameplay** – Optimized rendering and memory usage
* **Better Visuals** – Keep graphics clear without losing performance
* **Lightweight** – Works even on low-end PCs
* **Forge Compatible** – Can be combined with other Forge mods

---

## 📦 Included Mods

Here’s the list of mods included in the modpack and what they do:

### 1. Canary

Improves performance by optimizing game code and reducing unnecessary calculations.

### 2. Clumps

Merges XP orbs together to reduce lag when farming or mob grinding.

### 3. Embeddium

A modern **Sodium-like renderer** for Forge, designed to give massive FPS boosts.

### 4. EntityCulling

Skips rendering entities that are not visible to the player, saving resources.

### 5. FerriteCore

Optimizes memory usage of block and item models, reducing RAM consumption.

### 6. FPS Reducer

Reduces unnecessary resource usage when the game is idle or running in the background.

### 7. ImmediatelyFast

Speeds up immediate mode rendering for faster rendering and smoother gameplay.

### 8. MemoryLeakFix

Fixes common memory leaks in Minecraft to keep performance stable during long play sessions.

### 9. Noisium

Performance-focused fixes for world generation noise calculations.

### 10. Oculus

The Forge equivalent of **Iris**, enabling **shader support** with high performance.

### 11. Starlight

Replaces Minecraft’s lighting engine with a much faster and more efficient one.

### 12. WI Zoom

Adds a smooth zoom feature similar to OptiFine’s zoom, but lightweight.

---

## ⚡ Why Use This Modpack?

If you want the **best FPS boost on Forge**, this modpack is perfect for you. Unlike heavy performance packs, it stays **lightweight, stable, and compatible** with most Forge mods.

Whether you’re playing survival, building massive structures, or just exploring your world, you’ll experience:

* **Less lag spikes**
* **Better stability**
* **More responsive gameplay**

---

## 🎯 Final Thoughts

The **Forge Optimized Modpack** is designed for players who want smooth, lag-free gameplay without compromising on mod compatibility. Install it, and enjoy Minecraft Forge the way it’s meant to be played—**fast and stable**.
